data.question: Count the number of clubs.
data.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM club

data.question: What are the names of clubs, ordered alphabetically?
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM club ORDER BY Name ASC

data.question: Return the managers and captains of all clubs.
data.sql: SELECT Manager ,  Captain FROM club

data.question: What are the names of clubs who do not have the manufacturer Nike?
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM club WHERE Manufacturer != "Nike"

data.question: Return the names of players in order of count of wins, ascending.
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM player ORDER BY Wins_count ASC

data.question: Return the name of the player who earns the most money.
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM player ORDER BY Earnings DESC LIMIT 1

data.question: From which countries are players who make more than 1200000 from?
data.sql: SELECT DISTINCT Country FROM player WHERE Earnings  >  1200000

data.question: Of players who have more than 2 wins, what is the country of the player who makes the most?
data.sql: SELECT Country FROM player WHERE Wins_count  >  2 ORDER BY Earnings DESC LIMIT 1

data.question: What are the names of players and the corresponding clubs that they are in?
data.sql: SELECT T2.Name ,  T1.Name FROM club AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID

data.question: What are the names of clubs that have players who have won more than twice?
data.sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM club AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID WHERE T2.Wins_count  >  2

data.question: What are the names of players from the club managed by Sam Allardyce?
data.sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM club AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID WHERE T1.Manager  =  "Sam Allardyce"

data.question: What are the names of clubs, ordered descending by the average earnings of players within each?
data.sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM club AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID GROUP BY T1.Club_ID ORDER BY avg(T2.Earnings) DESC

data.question: How many clubs use each manufacturer?
data.sql: SELECT Manufacturer ,  COUNT(*) FROM club GROUP BY Manufacturer

data.question: Which manufacturer is most common among clubs?
data.sql: SELECT Manufacturer FROM club GROUP BY Manufacturer ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

data.question: Which manufacturers work for more than 1 club?
data.sql: SELECT Manufacturer FROM club GROUP BY Manufacturer HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

data.question: Which countries have produced more than one player?
data.sql: SELECT Country FROM player GROUP BY Country HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

data.question: What are the names of clubs that do not have any players?
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM club WHERE Club_ID NOT IN (SELECT Club_ID FROM player)

data.question: Which country has produced both players with earnings over 1400000 and players with earnings below 1100000?
data.sql: SELECT Country FROM player WHERE Earnings  >  1400000 INTERSECT SELECT Country FROM player WHERE Earnings  <  1100000

data.question: How many different countries are players from?
data.sql: SELECT COUNT (DISTINCT Country) FROM player

data.question: What are the earnings of players from either of the countries of Australia or Zimbabwe?
data.sql: SELECT Earnings FROM player WHERE Country  =  "Australia" OR Country  =  "Zimbabwe"
